docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,415.00 FILED BY KHALID, ABDERRAHMAN AS TO DEFENDANT BRIDGE HOUSING ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-19-2025 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $50. SERVED JAN-27-2025, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BRIDGE HOUSING

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-19-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-19-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE: JOSEPH HURLEY. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF ABDERRAHMAN KHALID IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BRIDGE HOUSING IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-19-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KHALID, ABDERRAHMAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BRIDGE HOUSING $3,415.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,515.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
JUDGMENT CREDITOR'S REQUEST FOR FUNDS COPY FORWARDED TO ACCOUNTING REVENUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF KHALID, ABDERRAHMAN
DEPOSIT OF JUDGMENT DEBTOR, TRAN # A5625612D004, TAG # 038042 BY DEFENDANT BRIDGE HOUSING
